scope: Senegal model input brief for team_profile only
notes: Recovered by main thread because the model child thread entered systemError and the file was missing.
This file is model input only; it does not output match score, W/D/L, group advancement, champion prediction, or betting advice.
Status remains partial until granular player availability, Opta and market movement data are filled.

baseline_strength_model.relative_group_position: behind France by market and broad-strength priors, competitive with Norway depending on matchup and availability, above Iraq by baseline

inputs_to_weight.current_value: mixed: dominant qualifying samples, but 0-0 Saudi Arabia and USA 3-2 Senegal warn against over-smoothing
+12500 winner, +750 Group I winner in one FanDuel/SI snapshot

lambda_xg_sensitivity.reason: Reduces left-side gravity, transition burst, and late-box threat.
Affects channel running, counter depth, and ability to turn wide attacks into central threat.
He anchors aerial duels, box defense, line authority and defensive confidence.
Goalkeeper stability matters in low-event matches and set-piece/box-control sequences.
Impacts second balls, counter-press recovery and central access denial.

style_modeling_notes.transition_attack: high positive modifier when opponent leaves space behind fullbacks or center-backs.
style_modeling_notes.settled_attack: medium; avoid giving Senegal the same low-block-breaking baseline as elite possession teams.
style_modeling_notes.defensive_floor: medium_high to high if Koulibaly, Mendy and midfield screen are available.
style_modeling_notes.pace_and_power: raises match volatility, especially against teams that play through wide or transitional zones.
style_modeling_notes.low_event_draw_risk: non-trivial against organized lower-tempo opponents because Senegal can control territory without reliably converting.
style_modeling_notes.set_pieces: positive but incomplete; do not over-credit without taker/target mapping.

market_calibration.interpretation: Market treats Senegal as dangerous but not an elite tournament favorite. This should temper both underdog-romance and overconfidence.
market_calibration.model_warning: Do not translate a long futures price into automatic value. It may reflect real gap to France and general title path difficulty.

needed_for_later_group_prediction: France-vs-Senegal expected lineup and injury update
data.completion_note: Usable as first Senegal team_profile model input, but intentionally not a prediction file.
